subject: Re: Barbro Ehnbom
body:
ask sarah

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

>  Dear Cecilia, do you think you could please check
> if it would be at all
> possible to have the perhaps smartest BBBBiotech
> girl, Ebba Kraemer, stay in
> an apt on 67/2nd for 5 or 6 nights next week?
> (Astrid Lilliestrï¿½hle, who he
> knows, will work with me on it in Sweden) Ebba is
> going to work on my
> Swedish-Amercan Life Science Summit 2006 planned for
> Stockholm August 16 -
> 18 from this end and stay in my apt when I leave for
> Sweden on May 19th..She
> will be arriving JFK 6PM Saturday night. By the way,
> please tell Jeffrey
> that Bob Goldsamt is hoping to have finally raised
> his money by August and
> come to Stockholm for the summit - with Jeffrey he
> hopes! And I! Thank you
> for finding out for me!!Are you in touch with Sanna
> Francke at Pfizer for
> Young Professionals etc? Love BE ps Jeffrey may
> enjoy hearing that the s.c.
> social Test for the 4 FEOY 2006 finalists will take
> place at Anna Dreber's
> home...the one going to his deptat Harvard in the
> fall!
>

body_html:
ask sarah

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Cecilia, do you think you could please check
if it would be at all
possible to have the perhaps smartest BBBBiotech
girl, Ebba Kraemer, stay in
an apt on 67/2nd for 5 or 6 nights next week?
(Astrid Lilliestrï¿½hle, who he
knows, will work with me on it in Sweden) Ebba is
going to work on my
Swedish-Amercan Life Science Summit 2006 planned for
Stockholm August 16 -
18 from this end and stay in my apt when I leave for
Sweden on May 19th..She
will be arriving JFK 6PM Saturday night. By the way,
please tell Jeffrey
that Bob Goldsamt is hoping to have finally raised
his money by August and
come to Stockholm for the summit - with Jeffrey he
hopes! And I! Thank you
for finding out for me!!Are you in touch with Sanna
Francke at Pfizer for
Young Professionals etc? Love BE ps Jeffrey may
enjoy hearing that the s.c.
social Test for the 4 FEOY 2006 finalists will take
place at Anna Dreber's
home...the one going to his deptat Harvard in the
fall!
